name: 地形地貌
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 地理与空间 / Place & Geography / Place & Geography
curriculum_points: Students will investigate how natural processes (erosion, deposition, tectonic activity) shape Earth's physical features, and represent their findings through models or diagrams.
By the end of Grade 5, students will be able to analyze the relationship between specific landforms and human activity, explaining how people adapt to and modify their physical environment.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
